name: Forge CRM
description: Workflow-first enterprise CRM reference product proving Forge as a factory/framework for agentic workflow systems.

permissions.description: Create, update and resume CRM workflows through Forge.
Ingest CRM messages from approved omnichannel adapters into Forge event inbox.
Generate proposals, contracts, emails, campaigns, reports and presentations as Forge artifacts.
Run bounded CRM copilots for lead classification, risk analysis and next-best-action recommendations.
Inspect CRM audit, lineage, costs, events, logs, metrics and workflow state through Forge observability.

capabilities.title: CRM workflow system factory
capabilities.description: Create CRM systems as Forge-native workflow applications rather than separate SaaS silos.
constraints: CRM automation must be routed through Forge runtime contracts
Core limitations must become forge-core backlog before parallel CRM shortcuts
risks: Domain implementation may mask Core gaps if not explicitly reported
External channel integrations require approval-gated adapters

capabilities.title: CRM relationship management
capabilities.description: Leads, contacts, companies, opportunities, pipeline Kanban, multiple funnels, history and unified timeline.

capabilities.title: CRM commercial operations
capabilities.description: Proposals, contracts, signatures, follow-ups, forecast, goals, commissions and account management.

capabilities.title: CRM omnichannel support
capabilities.description: Tickets, SLA, chat, WhatsApp, Telegram, email and central omnichannel queues.

capabilities.title: CRM marketing automation
capabilities.description: Campaigns, segmentation, automations, landing pages, forms and lead nurturing as workflows.

capabilities.title: CRM internal operations
capabilities.description: Projects, tasks, approvals, documents, internal flows and team handoffs.

capabilities.title: CRM AI and automation
capabilities.description: Lead classification, opportunity prioritization, proposal/document generation, executive summaries, risk analysis and next-step recommendations.

capabilities.title: CRM operational observability
capabilities.description: Audit, lineage, costs, events, logs, metrics and state inspection as Forge-owned CRM workflow artifacts.

workflows.description: Create a CRM system blueprint and implementation plan using Forge as the workflow application factory.
Manage leads, contacts, companies and opportunities as audited workflow-backed entities.
Render opportunity stages and movement as Forge workflow state transitions.
Generate, approve and attach sales proposals as Forge artifacts.
Draft, review, approve, sign and renew contracts with lineage.
Schedule follow-ups through Forge wait states and triggers.
Generate forecast, targets and commission evidence from workflow events.
Review account health, renewals, expansion and success-plan tasks through Forge workflow state.
Run ticket and SLA workflows with ownership, waiting states and escalation.
Route chat, WhatsApp, Telegram and email events into CRM workflows.
Plan, approve, run and report campaigns as workflow artifacts.
Run lead nurturing automations through Forge schedules and triggers.
Coordinate post-sale projects, tasks and team handoffs.
Manage CRM document queues, approvals and audit trail.
Inspect CRM audit, lineage, costs, events, logs, metrics and state from Forge-owned runtime evidence.
Map enterprise CRM success criteria to user-facing deliverables backed by Forge workflows, artifacts, events and validation evidence.
Run bounded copilots for classification, prioritization and recommendations.

runtime_contracts.title: CRM system factory planner
constraints: planner output is advisory until Forge validates and promotes it
Core gaps must be reported as forge-core backlog

runtime_contracts.title: CRM lead classifier
constraints: classification must include evidence and confidence
recommendations do not mutate customer state without workflow approval

runtime_contracts.title: CRM relationship timeline recorder
constraints: relationship timeline executor does not persist CRM state outside Forge
entity, relationship, pipeline and forecast changes must be promoted from Forge workflow artifacts and events
pipeline stage movement must include owner, reason and workflow lineage

runtime_contracts.title: CRM pipeline stage movement
constraints: pipeline stage movement does not persist CRM state outside Forge
multiple funnels and Kanban lanes must be represented as Forge artifacts
stage movement and forecast changes must be promoted as Forge workflow events

runtime_contracts.title: CRM operating copilot
constraints: operating copilot does not mutate CRM state directly
priority, risk and next-step recommendations require Forge workflow approval before state mutation
executive summaries must cite Forge workflow artifacts, events or memory context

runtime_contracts.title: CRM governed memory promotion preparation
constraints: memory promotion preparation does not write memory directly
actual promotion must be executed by forge memory promote with approval and lineage
raw private processing memory must be summarized before organization or global sharing

runtime_contracts.title: CRM observability inspector
constraints: observability inspection is derived from Forge workflow artifacts, events, costs, metrics and logs
observability inspection does not create CRM-local observability state
remediation from observations must be promoted through Forge workflow mutation or approval

runtime_contracts.title: CRM operating readiness package
constraints: readiness must map success criteria to user-facing deliverables
readiness evidence must come from Forge workflows, artifacts, events and validation gates
readiness inspection does not create CRM-local state

runtime_contracts.title: CRM tenant workflow bootstrap
constraints: bootstrap produces Forge-owned workflow artifacts, not a CRM-local database
worker output remains advisory until Forge attaches artifacts and validates workflow mutations

runtime_contracts.title: CRM operating snapshot
constraints: operating state is derived from Forge workflow artifacts and events
snapshot must not create a CRM-local database or parallel automation state

runtime_contracts.title: CRM proposal generator
constraints: proposal artifact must be attached to a workflow
approval is required before external delivery

runtime_contracts.title: CRM follow-up forecast and commission review
constraints: follow-up forecast executor does not persist CRM state outside Forge
scheduled follow-ups, forecast reviews, goals and commission accrual must be represented as Forge workflow events
commission evidence is forecast-only until the contract or revenue workflow validates it

runtime_contracts.title: CRM account management review
constraints: account management review does not persist CRM state outside Forge
renewal and expansion states must be represented as Forge workflow events
success-plan actions must be emitted as Forge-owned task plans

runtime_contracts.title: CRM contract signature lifecycle
constraints: contract signature lifecycle does not persist CRM state outside Forge
signature receipt must be attached as a Forge artifact before signed state
renewal schedule must be represented as Forge workflow events

runtime_contracts.title: CRM document generator
constraints: generated artifacts must be attached to a Forge workflow
approval is required before external delivery or signature
document generator must not deliver externally or mutate CRM state directly

runtime_contracts.title: CRM document validator
constraints: failed validation returns the workflow to work with a reason

runtime_contracts.title: CRM document approval decision
constraints: approval decisions do not persist CRM state outside Forge
approved and rework states must be represented as Forge workflow events
external delivery is only unblocked after a recorded approval decision

runtime_contracts.title: CRM project handoff planner
constraints: project handoff planning does not persist CRM state outside Forge
tasks must include owner, workflow lineage and blocked reason when blocked
handoff acceptance must be represented as Forge workflow events

runtime_contracts.title: CRM campaign automation
constraints: campaign automation does not persist CRM state outside Forge
campaign scheduling and nurture steps must be represented as Forge workflow events
external sends require approved handoff or document delivery workflow

runtime_contracts.title: CRM marketing form capture
constraints: form capture does not persist CRM state outside Forge
captured submissions must route into the Forge lead lifecycle
consent must be represented as a Forge artifact before nurture events

runtime_contracts.title: CRM omnichannel message ingestion
constraints: omnichannel message ingestion does not persist CRM state outside Forge
channel receipt and thread artifacts must exist before SLA triage
ticket creation must be represented as Forge workflow events before SLA or handoff

runtime_contracts.title: CRM ticket SLA triage
constraints: ticket SLA triage does not persist CRM state outside Forge
SLA wait and escalation state must be represented as Forge workflow events
external replies still require approved omnichannel handoff

runtime_contracts.title: CRM omnichannel handoff
constraints: external message delivery requires approved integration policy

actions.label: Bootstrap CRM
actions.description: Create a CRM system blueprint through Forge workflow planning.

metadata.principle: Forge is a factory/framework for agentic workflow systems
